channel.title: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: The Roosevelt-Truman Brotherhood: A Lesson for Today’s Trumpian World
item.description: In the spring of 1945, President Franklin Roosevelt had become the most powerful man on the planet. With the war in Europe nearing its end and the Pacific War in its final months, no one nation or alliance of states could now challenge him. But he faced an existential question — would he, possessing such ... Read more

item.title: A race for rights: How sport is helping protect girls in Uganda
item.description: On a red running track in eastern Uganda, coach Zuena Cheptoek is doing more than training runners. For many girls in the Sebei subregion, she is also a confidante, a mentor and first line of protection against female genital mutilation, child marriage and abuse.
